subject: fix(polish): add expired module treatment, input validation, notification triggers, mobile fixes
body:
Complete Phase 7 frontend polish:
- Expired modules: greyed-out cards with "Expired" badge, warning banners,
  signing toggle hidden, batch sign excludes expired
- Input validation: character counters and limits on module content (10K),
  notes (2K), proposals (10K)
- PDF verification: loading state with disabled button during generation
- Notification triggers: wired to all key events (signing, proposals, notes,
  sequence approval, splits, status changes, handshake, agreement requests)
- Mobile: responsive notification dropdown, flex-wrap on PDF preview buttons

Tags: polish, expired, validation, notifications, mobile, phase7
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mvp-frontend
Semver: patch
